expectations.text: Uses font-serif italic for main headings
expectations.evidence: Line 166: 'text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900' — uses bold sans-serif, not serif italic

expectations.text: Cards have rounded-[2rem] or larger border radius
expectations.evidence: Line 61: 'rounded-2xl' on stat cards; Line 228: 'rounded-2xl' on weekly chart — uses standard small radii, not Sanctuary's large rounded-[2rem]+

expectations.text: Includes decorative blur glow elements on cards
expectations.evidence: No decorative blur glow blobs found on any card
Line 2: 'import { motion } from "framer-motion"' — uses legacy framer-motion package, not motion/react

expectations.text: Primary color #0059b6 is used for accents
expectations.evidence: Uses violet/purple palette throughout: 'text-violet-600', 'bg-violet-100', 'from-violet-600 to-purple-600' — not the blue primary
Lines 4-12: imports Clock, Flame, BarChart3, Play, Heart, TrendingUp, Calendar, Sparkles from lucide-react

expectations.text: Stat numbers are large and use serif italic font
expectations.evidence: Line 68: 'text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900' — uses bold sans-serif, not large serif italic

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill output is a generic violet-themed dashboard. Fails on Sanctuary-specific design elements.
